{{Infobox artifact
| name = Shera's shear
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has a bronze shear.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]]'s [[Awakened]] shear flares green and releases [[emerald]] lights when used.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]]'s [[Awakened]] shear steals strength and can turn a target's own power against them.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera's shear]] is the blade that killed [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
